title: cyclosorus gamblei
intro: Cyclosorus gamblei, also known as the Gamble's fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus gamblei include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and made into capsules or tablets for consumption.
